features: 👍【Convenient to Carry 】: Portable mini 5ml pocket size perfume atomiser spray bottles, size 8x1.7cm, perfect for carrying when travel.

🌺【Leakproof Design】: The portable perfume refillable bottles with a leakproof loop inside will not leak for impacting. You never worry about leaking for placing the refillable purse spray in your bag.

💎【Premium Qualtity】: The travel perfume atomiser refillable bottles are made of high qualtity aluminum and the inside of durable PP plastic,so you do not need to worry it will be broken when drop onto the floor, durable in use. and it has a fill lavel indicator window to show how much it has left. it is perfect for storing perfume, aftershave.etc

🌻【Easy to Refill】: First of all, Remove the cap of atomiser spray bottle, and press the nozzle few times to exhaust the air inside. Secondly, take off the cap of perfume bottle, then let the bottom of the mini spray bottle aim at the straw, and finally press the mini spray bottle up and down repeatedly to fill in the perfume.
🌞【Wide Use】:These perfume travel bottle are essential oils, perfumes, men’s aftershave and fragrances, facial and body mists, and various water-based liquids, essences, toners, rosewater, etc.
description: Product Description This set of 4 Pcs 5ml portable mini refillable perfume atomiser spray bottles is suitable for travel and outgoing, easy to refill and convienent to carry. Comes with 4 different colors so you can refill with different perfume or liquid without mix. About this product: Capacity: 5ml Material: Aluminum + PP Plastic Color: Bright Black + Bright Gold + Bright Silver + Bright Pink Size: 8cm x 1.7cm / 3.2" x 0.7" Quantity: Total 4 PCS Type: Underfill Product Details Lightweight and Convenient The 5ml perfume bottle size 8*1.7 cm, very handy and lightweight to keep in the purse or bag, and you can take it wherever you go. Quality Spray Nozzle with high quality spray nozzle and easy to press, sturdy and durable, don't worry about them leaking in your bag. Visual Window Each bottles has a little window on the side of body, it's convenient to see through how much liquid you have left. Leekproof Silicone Bottom Sealed food grade rubber ring can effectively prevent perfume from leaking.You never worry about leaking for placing the refillable purse spray in your bag. Tips: As the length of the perfume nozzle is different, please confirm the nozzle size requirements before buying spray nozzle tube for big bottle of perfume. Easy to Refill !!Special Tip: Please don't fill this bottle fully, because there is a air-hole on the sprayer, if too fully, it can be leaked from the air-hole. !!Note: The item are just empty Perfume Bottle, without Perfume in the bottle. Please press few times to let the air out before put the perfume. Check the bottom hole is works, and put the perfume into the bottle.
